---
title: "Urban Air Pollution"
pagetitle: "Urban Air Pollution | Peleg Kremer"
description: "Mobile monitoring and spatial analysis of urban air pollution in Philadelphia and across US cities."
---

::: {.project-meta}
::: {}
::: {.label}
Program of work
:::
2016 to present
:::
::: {}
::: {.label}
My role
:::
Co-lead with Kabindra Shakya
:::
::: {}
::: {.label}
Key collaborator
:::
Kabindra Shakya (Villanova Chemistry)
:::
:::

## The work

Sustained collaboration with Dr. Kabindra Shakya in Villanova Chemistry on fine-scale spatial analysis of urban air pollution. The program combines mobile monitoring of air and noise pollution in Philadelphia neighborhoods with spatial analysis of pollution exposure, environmental-justice patterns, and built-environment drivers.

Past student-led work has included citywide mobile monitoring (Kate Henderson, Samantha Bromberg, Meghan McMahon), land-use regression for nitrogen dioxide (Ben Terry), spatial modeling that links pollution to three-dimensional urban structure (Lucas Cummings), and environmental-justice mapping of intra-urban pollution disparities in Philadelphia (Madeline Scolio, Charlotte Bohra, Olivia Pistella). Current work by Emily Myers extends this to PM2.5 exposure and chronic disease across 500 US cities.

## Key publications

- Terry, B., Kremer, P., Goldsmith, S. T., Shakya, K. M. (2025). Land use regression model to predict nitrogen dioxide in the greater Philadelphia area. *Atmospheric Pollution Research*, 16(1), 102339. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.apr.2024.102339)
- Scolio, M., Bohra, C., Kremer, P., Shakya, K. M. (2024). Spatial analysis of intra-urban air pollution disparities through an environmental justice lens: a case study of Philadelphia, PA. *Atmosphere*, 15(7), 755. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.3390/atmos15070755)
- Cummings, L. E., Stewart, J. D., Kremer, P., Shakya, K. (2022). Predicting citywide distribution of air pollution using mobile monitoring and three-dimensional urban structure. *Sustainable Cities and Society*, 76, 103510. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.scs.2021.103510)
- Cummings, L. E., Stewart, J. D., Reist, R., Shakya, K. M., Kremer, P. (2021). Mobile monitoring of air pollution reveals spatial and temporal variation in an urban landscape. *Frontiers in Built Environment*, 7. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.3389/fbuil.2021.648620)
- Shakya, K. M., Kremer, P., Henderson, K., McMahon, M., Peltier, R. E., Bromberg, S., Stewart, J. (2019). Mobile monitoring of air and noise pollution in Philadelphia neighborhoods during summer 2017. *Environmental Pollution*, 255, 113195. [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.envpol.2019.113195)

## Students currently working on this project

Emily Myers
